block_01: On Thursday, May 30th 2019,  the U.S will be releasing data related to Gross Domestic Product for Q1. GDP measures the overall output of an economy, in other words GDP gauges the health of an economy.
block_02: A result higher than the expected forecast, is said to be good for USD.  You could expect the opposite for lower than expected forecast.
block_03: Forecasts for Q2 are already being established.  On Friday, May 24th, CNN reported that JPMorgan Economists have lowered their forecast for Q2  to just 1% from their initial 2.25% stating  concerns regarding trade tensions in the U.S which have a high impact on business sentiment and activity.
block_04: Will the U.S. meet forecasted expectations?  Stay tuned on our Market Analysis tab for the results.
